title: Pre-final mix
description: Last big mix before the certificate exam
text: I write stories, I count to 10, I love my family, and I have 3 pets named Max, Coco, and Bear. My favorite color is red. My favorite food is pizza. What is yours?

character_tips.anna: Pre-final drill. Two lessons to certificate!
character_tips.maxim: All content classes at 48 WPM. Pre-final.
character_tips.klavochka: Almost at the certificate, my dear 🎓
